words.def: a dramatic work intended for performance by actors on a stage
words.zh: n. 遊戲, 遊玩, 玩笑, 運動, 比賽, 賭博, 跳動, 表演, 劇本

words.def: the upper side of the thighs of a seated person
words.zh: n. 膝蓋, 舔, 一圈, 下襬, 衣兜, 山坳
n. 薪資, 付款, 補償

words.def: a narrative song with a recurrent refrain
words.zh: vt. 放置, 產, 鋪設, 佈置, 提出, 平息
